prompt: I'm about to start a 1-1 with Aarav. Take notes.
expect: asks meeting title and attendees; invokes take-notes; on completion proposes routing to knowledge/personnel/aarav/ per Repo Map; extracts action items; links attendee; updates SQLite and session-log

prompt: I just dropped a Zoom transcript into team-inbox. Reconcile against my SLT meeting notes.
expect: detects transcript; finds today's SLT notes; invokes resolve-against-transcript; routes to leadership meeting-home folder; asks about transcript disposition; indexes and logs
infers meeting type from notes title/attendees; proposes routing destination using Repo Map; links attendees; extracts action items; saves with date-slug filename; indexes and logs

prompt: I have a transcript but no notes. Generate notes from it.
expect: reads transcript from team-inbox/ or specified path; generates structured notes directly; runs full post-processing pipeline

prompt: What action items came out of my meetings this week?
expect: searches session-log.md for this week's pka-meetings open thread entries; queries search_fts for '- [ ]' in recently-filed meeting notes; surfaces consolidated list with source links

prompt: take-notes isn't installed. File my meeting notes anyway.
expect: detects missing take-notes; reports capture unavailable; proceeds with route-only mode; completes full post-processing pipeline

prompt: I was in a Satori project meeting. Route the notes there.
expect: detects 'Satori' matches active project in Repo Map; asks: project workspace or knowledge base? Does not auto-route to project workspace
